candidate_check.description: Microsoft Defender AV must enable the file hash computation feature.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> MpEngine >> Enable file hash computation feature is set to "Enabled"; otherwise, this is a finding.

Procedure: Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 
HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\MpEngine

Criteria: If the value "EnableFileHashComputation" is REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.

If the value is 0, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> MpEngine >>Enable file hash computation feature to "Enabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must enable the file hash computation feature.
